name: dante-doorway
prompt: Medium shot of young man leaning in a dormitory doorway. Tan skin, messy black hair with undercut, academy shirt open at collar showing chest and silver chain necklace, rolled sleeves showing geometric wrist tattoo on forearm. Lazy confident expression, half-lidded dark eyes. One shoulder against doorframe. Warm hazy atmosphere visible in room behind. Night scene. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading
bubble: Speech from Dante on LEFT in doorway, place bubble TOP-LEFT with tail pointing to him

name: dante-pov
prompt: Over-shoulder shot from behind a dark-haired young man, looking at a young woman with deep red wavy disheveled hair standing at a vanity. She wears white shirt rebuttoned with one button missed, damp skin visible at throat. Heat shimmer filling the room. Vanity drawer slightly ajar behind her. Warm amber lighting. Her expression guarded but exposed. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

name: stepping-close
prompt: Two-shot medium, slight low angle. Young woman with deep red wavy hair wearing ONLY a white shirt messily rebuttoned no blazer no jacket on RIGHT stepping close to young man with tan skin and messy black hair on LEFT. Warm shimmer visible in the air between them, two heat effects overlapping. She faces him directly, close proximity. He stands relaxed at doorframe. Dormitory room with warm amber lighting. Charged atmosphere. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading
